title: Rich Flaky Portuguese Fish Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Portuguese dish featuring fatty and flaky fish, cooked to perfection in a robata-grill and served with a side of unsalted butter, perfect for a family dinner
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Thread the cod fish cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Brush the melted butter onto the fish, making sure each piece is fully coated
Sprinkle the lemon juice, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper over the fish
Brush the olive oil onto the grill to prevent sticking
Place the skewers onto the grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, flipping occasionally
Serve the fish hot, garnished with lemon wedges and melted butter on the side
Place the fondue pot in the center of the table and let everyone dip their fish in the melted butter
